<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the checklist below.
For style and contribution rules, see CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- e.g. "Add LangGraph to Agent Frameworks section" -->

## Why does this resource deserve inclusion?

<!--
- Active maintainer / community?
- What makes it stand out vs already-listed alternatives?
- Has it been around for 30+ days (not just-launched)?
- (For tools) GitHub stars / production usage?
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] One suggestion per PR (multiple = multiple PRs)
- [ ] Searched README to confirm no duplicate
- [ ] Entry follows style guide: `* [Name](url) — short description`
- [ ] Direct link to homepage (not affiliate / redirect)
- [ ] Description is ≤ 100 chars, no marketing language
- [ ] Added to the correct section
- [ ] Trailing whitespace stripped
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and abide by [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Disclosure

- [ ] No affiliate/referral link, OR
- [ ] Affiliate link is clearly disclosed in the entry with `[affiliate]`
